    IncorrectPasswordException - Exception Class in io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.exception
    Exception to be thrown when the User entered the wrong password.
    IncorrectPasswordException() - Constructor for exception class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.exception.IncorrectPasswordException
    Constructs a new exception with null as its detail message.
    IncorrectPasswordException(String) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.exception.IncorrectPasswordException
    Constructs a new exception with the specified detail message.
    IncorrectPasswordException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.exception.IncorrectPasswordException
    Constructs a new exception with the specified detail message and cause.
    IncorrectPasswordException(String, Throwable, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.exception.IncorrectPasswordException
    Constructs a new exception with the specified detail message, cause, suppression enabled or disabled, and writable stack trace enabled or disabled.
    IncorrectPasswordException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.exception.IncorrectPasswordException
    Constructs a new exception with the specified cause and a detail message of (cause==null ? null : cause.toString()) (which typically contains the class and detail message of cause).
    IncorrectUsernameException - Exception Class in io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.exception
    Exception to be thrown when the User entered the wrong username.

    Constructs a new exception with the specified detail message and cause.
    IncorrectUsernameException(String, Throwable, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.exception.IncorrectUsernameException
    Constructs a new exception with the specified detail message, cause, suppression enabled or disabled, and writable stack trace enabled or disabled.

    Constructs a new exception with the specified cause and a detail message of (cause==null ? null : cause.toString()) (which typically contains the class and detail message of cause).
